overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a covered urban street with massive industrial overhead structures. The scene transitions from a dark, shadow-covered walkway with neon lights to a bright open intersection, featuring futuristic cyberpunk architecture and light vehicular traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial pedestrian walkway under massive overhead pipes

events.description: black vehicle passes by on the right side of the road
red neon lights become visible on the left wall ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered industrial walkway, moving from deep shadow toward a brighter area ahead

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: complex network of industrial pipes and beams forming a roof over the walkway
wide concrete pedestrian path with striped shadow patterns from overhead structure
tall red and gray industrial building facade with multiple levels
standard traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dark industrial covered walkway with massive overhead pipes and beams. The concrete path runs parallel to a road where vehicles occasionally pass by on the right. Shadows from the overhead structure create striped patterns on the ground as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial walkway with red neon lighting and yellow overhead fixtures

events.description: ego passes a woman in white top and red pants walking in the same direction
approaching bright exit, natural sunlight becoming dominant ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered section, passing other pedestrians while red neon lights illuminate the left wall

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and red pants walking ahead of ego in the same direction

entered.detail: vertical red neon light strips mounted on the left wall
rows of yellow industrial lights hanging from the overhead structure
orange metal safety railings separating the walkway from the road

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the industrial overpass where red neon light strips illuminate the left wall and yellow fixtures hang overhead. The character passes other pedestrians walking in the same direction while orange railings separate the walkway from the road. The environment gradually brightens as the open exit approaches ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection at the end of the covered walkway

events.description: exiting the covered industrial structure into bright open sunlight
approaching crosswalk at the intersection with traffic lights visible

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered walkway and stepping into the bright open intersection, continuing forward across the street

entered.detail: clear blue sky visible as the covered structure ends
modern building with dark glass facade and red neon trim
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into bright open sunlight at an urban intersection. The character crosses the street over a marked crosswalk as the massive overhead structure recedes behind. Modern buildings line the left side while the open sky dominates the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed industrial corridor into the brilliant light of a sprawling urban intersection. It begins within a dark covered walkway, moving past massive overhead pipes and beams that cast striped shadows across the concrete path. As the character progresses, the environment shifts toward a glow of red neon strips and yellow fixtures, passing other pedestrians along a road bordered by orange railings. The scene then opens and brightens significantly as the camera exits the overpass, leaving the industrial structures behind. Finally, the view expands into full sunlight, crossing a marked street toward modern buildings under an open sky.
